description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house with a predominantly rectangular form and a flat roof. The structure features a mix of black and white exterior surfaces, with large windows arranged in horizontal bands on the main facades. The house includes multiple levels, with visible interior partitioning and open spaces, suggesting a spacious and contemporary layout. The roof is flat with several raised sections and skylights, and there are two prominent chimneys. The windows are mostly rectangular and symmetrically placed, with green-tinted glass panels. The house sits on a broad, flat base that could represent a patio or driveway area.
description: A modern, multi-story house with a flat roof, black and white exterior, and large, symmetrically arranged windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with large horizontal windows, a flat roof, and a broad base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, flat roof sections, and minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying more windows, a flat roof, and the symmetry of the window arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the extended base, side windows, and roof details.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway is flush with the facade, likely featuring a modern door with minimal overhang and no visible porch or columns.
